list.txt: - This is a great place to stay wile visiting Sitges. There is a strong smell coming from the shower as i think the paint it recently. Lets hope it does last long time.

- Die Unterkunft war sauber, gut ausgestattet. Der Check-in verlief unkompliziert und die Kommunikation mit dem Gastgeber war schnell und freundlich. Insgesamt ein angenehmer Aufenthalt – ich würde jederzeit wiederkommen.

- Das Airbnb ist in einer ruhigen Lage, nahe des Strandes, die Entfernung zum Bahnhof ist auch gut. Die Unterkunft ist wie auf den Fotos abgebildet. Wirkte sogar größer in echt. Wir haben uns vom ersten Moment an wohl gefühlt und haben es genossen. Mit dem Aufzug kann man in die Etagen fahren. Da passt auch ein Kinderwagen rein. Die gemeinsam genutzte Dachterrasse war super. Dort befindet sich auch die Waschmaschine, sowie der Trockner. Die Mitarbeiter waren sehr freundlich, jedoch nur zu den Bürozeiten erreichbar. Die Nachrichten wirkten manchmal nicht von einer Person geschrieben, aber war in unserem Fall nicht schlimm. Würden die Unterkunft jedem empfehlen.
- Me encantó el sitio! Muy bien ubicado y muy bonito todo! Lo recomiendo 100%

- Great location and amazing value for money. The hosts were super responsive, providing clear instructions and offering advice on the local area. The studio apartment was huge and well appointed, I really enjoyed staying here and would certainly stay here again.
Finde sitges - Todo, estuvimos genial, céntrico, limpio, con una terraza súper agradable…. Todo perfecto.
Anbefalingsværdigt - Fantastisk sted, det var godt indrettet, nemt at komme til, beliggenheden er i top. Skøn tagterrasse 😎

Fantastic stay and such a beautiful place to visit. - Location to beach front. Unit was small but very nice. Bed was comfortable and had everything you need. The bed was very close to walls as I am small was not a problem. No good for larger size persons with mobility issues who would find it hard getting in and Out of the bed.

- Location excellent and communication with host 110% bravo 👏. Pictures of apartment online are good and realistic so no surprises when entering the apartment The rooftop was great as well and easy access.

10/10 for a couples or small families - My son and I have had a wonderful time. All the facilities were fantastic and the staff was extremely friendly and welcoming. Highly recommended and for sure we will be back soon! The towels were quite deteriorated, everything else was pretty good.

It was great stay with my sister. We really enjoyed the apartment and Sitges! - Location of the apartment was best, very close to the church. Only couple of minutes to the beaches and all stores and restaurants near by.
- Es war sehr geräumig mit einem Loft ; sehr ruhig, zentral gelegen 2 Minuten bis zum Meer. Der Fußboden hatte Risse die nicht repariert wurden.
- limpieza

Très belle découverte - L’emplacement la terrasse vue mer et le clocher appartement cosy bouteille d’eau et deux capsules de café offerte top Le lit de mauvaise qualité il y avait un creux au milieu Le jour de notre départ nous n’avons pas eu d’eau chaude
Loft muy cómodo, muy buena ubicación, limpio y trato muy amable - La ubicación y el mismo apartamento Nada, todo estupendo
Great spacious apartment with a great location! - There are no comments available for this review
- Piękny apartament, wszystko co bylo w opisie bylo w apartamencie. Bardzo dobry i miły kontakt, Nie bylo takiej rzeczy

Mega - Die Lage ist unschlagbar. Direkt neben an ist ein super Tapas Restaurant. Die rooftop Terrasse ist frei nutzbar und man hat einen wunderschönen Blick auf Sitges. Das Zimmer hat mit ihrer Größe und Ambiente vollkommen überzeugt. Der Kontakt war total freundlich und problemlos. Wir betreuen nur, nicht länger dort geblieben zu sein. Sollte die Anreise mit dem Auto erfolgen muss man sich vorher über die Parksituation Gedanken machen. Es ist nicht möglich direkt an der Unterkunft zu parken..

Thank you very much ❤️ 😊 - The stay was exceptional. We were able to check-in at the main office. The staff was professional and assisted with getting to the resident and how to enter. Answered all my questions.
Espectacular - Tot -
- Bardzo fajny apartament.
- Bon accueil , propre et bien équipé Personnel agréable et sympa
Très bien! Lit hyper confortable - L’emplacement et le confort Rien

Wonderful stay in a great area - This was by far one of my favorite vacation retreats. The surrounding neighborhoods felt safe, with lots of dining options and shops around. It's also about a 10-15 minute walk from the train station, which we used to go to Barcelona (btw the ride was very scenic). A small thing that was also very appreciated was a large water bottle available for us in the kitchen. It was so needed since we arrived to the apartment late at night, and all the stores were closed by that point! Overall, I really enjoyed our stay and will definitely return!

Két fő számára szuper, tágas, jól felszerelt, tiszta - Nagyszerű elhelyezkedés, közel a tenger, főtér, kávézók. Vonatállomás 10 perc séta Kissé nehézkes a bejelentkezés, plusz fura volt a biztosíték fizetése.

Un séjour fluide, confortable et parfaitement organisé, entre autonomie, espace agréable et accompag - Nous avons loué le Loft 2 et le Loft 3 ce week-end à Sitges et nous avons été ravis de l’expérience. Les deux appartements sont totalement autonomes, ce qui permet une grande liberté et une vraie tranquillité durant le séjour. Les infrastructures sont modernes, bien entretenues et très fonctionnelles. Tout est pensé pour être pratique et confortable, que ce soit pour un court week-end ou un séjour plus long. L’espace est un vrai point fort : les lofts sont lumineux, bien agencés et offrent suffisamment de place pour se sentir à l’aise, sans sensation d’encombrement. La configuration permet à la fois de partager des moments conviviaux et d’avoir son intimité. Le check-in et le check-out ont été extrêmement simples et fluides. Les instructions étaient claires, précises et faciles à suivre, ce qui rend l’arrivée et le départ totalement sans stress. Enfin, la disponibilité du staff via WhatsApp est un vrai plus. Réactifs, professionnels et toujours prêts à aider, ils répondent rapidement aux questions et facilitent vraiment l’organisation du séjour. Nous recommandons vivement le Loft 2 et le Loft 3 pour un séjour à Sitges : confort, autonomie et excellent accompagnement. Rien

- Despite the nice renovation, this was one of the worst apartments I have ever stayed in. It was simply impossible to sleep; I was constantly sleep-deprived. Every morning, construction workers were drilling throughout our entire stay. They drilled freely from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. The appliances here are also terrible. The refrigerator started leaking on the very first day. The dishwasher is rusty and rotting. The kettle and toaster are the cheapest ones they could possibly buy and provide. And finally, there are ants here, and they come out from all the baseboards. They crawl literally everywhere. There are so many of them that we got tired of fighting them.

Overpriced, loud, and poorly maintained – A very unpleasant stay - Location is good • Value for Money: The room was extremely small and dark, making it feel very claustrophobic. Given the high price point, the quality of the accommodation was significantly below expectations. • Noise Issues: * The soundproofing is very poor; you can hear everything. • There is a bar located right next to the property that is extremely loud late into the night. • Inside the room, the fridge was incredibly noisy and ran constantly, making it difficult to sleep. • Maintenance & Neglect: * The lighting was flickering throughout the entire stay. • The bathroom sink was partially clogged, meaning water would not drain properly. • Note on Staff: I notified the personnel about these issues, but they were completely ignored. No one ever came to perform repairs. • Service & Amenities: I stayed for 6 nights, yet there was no free towel service. Expecting guests to pay extra for clean towels during a week-long stay is unacceptable and greedy. • Overall Experience: Between the lack of maintenance, the noise, and the hidden costs for basic necessities, the stay was very unpleasant. I would not recommend this property to anyone.

Joli mais beaucoup trop bruyant - La vue Attention endroit bruyant : aucune isolation avec l’immeuble d’à côté. On entend les discussions et la television des voisins, l’ascenseur et le club the dutchess (bien que l’appartement soit au dernier etage!) Impossible de dormir sans bouchons d’oreilles. J’ai été empêché de dormir et réveillé dans la nuit.

Joli mais beaucoup trop bruyant - La vue Attention endroit bruyant : aucune isolation avec l’immeuble d’à côté. On entend les discussions et la television des voisins, l’ascenseur et le club the dutchess (bien que l’appartement soit au dernier etage!) Impossible de dormir sans bouchons d’oreilles. J’ai été empêché de dormir et réveillé dans la nuit.

Decepcionante pero buena ubicación - Buena ubicación Bastante ruido (no solo de la calle, sino también escuchando todo lo de otras habitaciones). Había muchas pequeñas polillas. Le vendría bien una puesta a punto, empezando por controlar mejor la humedad o poner otro suelo.

- El trato del personal Que la cama está en un altillo con el techo bajo y una escalera de caracol,no lo vi cuando hice la reserva Como no podemos subir y bajar esas escaleras pedimos un cambio y nos asignaron una categoría inferior porque no había disponibilidad,la queja es que no nos compensan la diferencia ni siquiera con el parking que contratamos

- El trato del personal Que la cama está en un altillo con el techo bajo y una escalera de caracol,no lo vi cuando hice la reserva Como no podemos subir y bajar esas escaleras pedimos un cambio y nos asignaron una categoría inferior porque no había disponibilidad,la queja es que no nos compensan la diferencia ni siquiera con el parking que contratamos
- Beide rugpijn gekregen door het bed. Mensen laat op de avond nog meerdere keren kloppend op ons raam (lagen al te slapen)

- El alojamiento en sí está muy bien. Es encantador y muy bien ubicado pero tiene un problema muy grande que no depende de ellos. Justo debajo tienen un pub cuya insonorización es prácticamente inexistente a juzgar por lo que se oía. Nosotros fuimos un fin de semana y nos fue totalmente imposible dormir hasta las 3 de la mañana que cierran. La habitación retumbaba y la calle estaba constantemente llena de gente borracha gritando que hacían imposible dormir. Si no fuera por eso sería un lugar de 10. El Pub situado justo abajo.
- The property and room itself is good There is a bar next to the property, you can’t sleep until 3am as it is so noisy with drunk people talk and music.
- There are no comments available for this review
- There are no comments available for this review
- There are no comments available for this review

Angemessen, gerne wieder! - Sehr modern, bequem, gepflegt! Der Zugang mit Nummerncode, ohne Schlüssel ist sehr praktisch! Die Lage ist sehr zentral, nahe am Strand! Alles was man braucht gibt es in unmittelbarer Nähe! Schade, dass keine Balkonmöbel auf den Balkon passen.
- There are no comments available for this review
Satisfactoria - limpio y centrico El edificio por fuera quita las ganas

Great stay - would stay again! - Great location very close to the beach, shops and groceries. The flat was very comfortable to stay in, clean, great bed, spacious, great shower, great lighting and everything you can ask for in a self-catering apartment. It has basic kitchen necessities and cutlery and you are provided with a cleaning kit including bin bags, sponge, dishwasher tablets and laundry tablets. There is a laundry washer and dryer on the top floor too which was great. We stayed for 10 days and there was a mid-point cleaning session at day 7. We were asked to buy new cleaning kit from the management team when we asked for extra dishwasher tablets (only 2 -3 given for 10 day stay and we cooked everyday). We ended up buying dishwasher tablets as it was cheaper and brought extra home.
Great apartment in a wonderful handy locatation - The apartment was in a great location and we had everything we needed also toiletries , thanks ! Sunny balcony was magical A better mattress please ,

- Leise Im Zimmer stand ein großer Pax-Schrank ohne Türen, der den Blick dauerhaft auf Kleidung und Unordnung freigab. Warum dieser offen blieb, ist unklar, zumal auf anderen Fotos des Anbieters andere, passendere Möbel zu sehen waren. Eine Verbesserung wäre, den Schrank mit Türen zu versehen oder konsequent Möbel im Industrial-Stil zu verwenden. Auch hatte wir da EG nur Blick nach aussen auf die eingemauerte Terrasse
Perfectly - spacious apartment located very close to the beach, a quiet, peaceful street. clean, modern and fully equipped interior with a shared terrace on the roof -

Good location and great facilities. Just make sure you’re out partying or very tired to sleep through the noise. - Location to the beach and restaurants was great and walking distance to the train station Next door to a nightclub. Being on the 1st floor was very noisy in the early hours.
Great Location and Good apartment - Great location 1 min walk from the beach and all the good restaurants. If you’re tall might be a small hassle to get in the bed as the ceiling was slightly low

Una estancia cómoda y fantástica en el centro de Sitges para disfrutar el carnaval intensamente. - Me gustó la amplitud del LOFT TERRACE 2, su decoración funcional pero elegante, su luminosidad con el ventanal de la terraza, la cama comodísima y enorme, la cabina de ducha muy grande y cómoda, y la cocina plenamente equipada y también el servicio de limpieza amedia estancia nos pareció fenomenal. El baño era pequeño pero funcional.

- Appartement bien situé et spacieux. Bon équipement et literie très confortable. Concept loft qui laisse peu d'intimité en raison de l'espace salle de bain ouvert sur le séjour. Information incomplète concernant la terrasse qui n’est pas privative mais collective.
Muy a gusto y ambiente muy agradable y bien decorado - Decoracion, comodidad, en general, todo. Un poco bajo el altillo, justo para 170, pero no fue una pega en realidad puesto q solo es para dormir.
- Great veranda Shower room a bit small

Nice, modern studio/loft apartment with good location and access to shared rooftop terrace - Very nice apartment with an open mezzanine/sleeping loft. The apartment was clean and tidy, and was equipped with everything needed. The roof terrace, shared between the 7 rooms in this facility was very nice, facing south-west, with good opportunity to catch the sun. This was a big plus for us. The loft apartment (no 6) balcony was just a 40cm space outside the balcony door. No place to sit out and enjoy the morning sun. This was not so clear from the description on the web-site. We were there in March, when the air-condition was not needed. The sleeping loft became quite warm if the temperature downstairs were kept at a comfortable level. This may be better in the warmer season when the air-condition will be in use.

It has basic kitchen necessities and cutlery and you are provided with a cleaning kit including bin bags, sponge, dishwasher tablets and laundry tablets. - Close enough to the center of the city, and remote enough to not have the noise around. Nice big room with all needed amenities. Even a small kitchen. Great value for the price Nothing really.
Perfectly - spacious apartment located very close to the beach, a quiet, peaceful street. clean, modern and fully equipped interior with a shared terrace on the roof -
Great Location and Good apartment - Great location 1 min walk from the beach and all the good restaurants. If you’re tall might be a small hassle to get in the bed as the ceiling was slightly low

Good location and great facilities. Just make sure you’re out partying or very tired to sleep through the noise. - Location to the beach and restaurants was great and walking distance to the train station Next door to a nightclub. Being on the 1st floor was very noisy in the early hours.

- Apartament net, bonic i molt ben situat. És còmode i silenciós per descansar estant a ple centre. S’ha de pensar que la circulació amb cotxe està molt restringida i podria ser un inconvenient si vens molt carregat. Repetiria l’allotjament. Respecte a la comunicació amb l’empresa que ho gestiona, crec que és millorable. S’entén que els treballadors tenen horari, cap problema, però tenen missatges automàtics que no sempre segueixen el fil de la conversa o la sensació de no sempre tenir present les meves respostes i això portava a confusió. Un cop parlaves amb la persona, va ser amable en el tracte, l’automatització, regular.

- The location is excellent near the beach, near a lot of restaurants and the old town. It was very clean and the bed comfy . We could easily explore Sitges and it was only a 10 min walk to the train station and visit Barcelona. The train takes you straight to the main train station Sants. The only reason I have docked two points is the following. Reason. We had the downstairs apartment which I didn't think I booked at the time and it is literally next to a night club that finishes at 3.30am. the problem is the people lean against the railings and talk all night whilst smoking and it was soooo annoying. The club is sound proof so the music wasn't the issue . But unhappy with the sleep situation and would not book this apartment again. Be aware of this but apart from that the apartment is good.
- Great location. Nice and clean. Comfy bed. Has most things we needed. Only two coffee pods was a disappointment. Wifi was patchy.

Un bel endroit, moderne central, un accueil chaleureux - La localisation centre ville près de tout , la décoration moderne et raffinée , la terrasse avec un vue mer. les communs de l'immeuble sont superbes, un asencseur Le lit avec un creux au milieux le sommier et le matelas doivent être remplacés, les taies d'oreillers étaient limite propre. Le lavabo de la salle de bain est minuscule.
- Ubicación a minutos del centro de Sitges, playas, bares, restaurantes Al ser un primer piso había algo de ruido
Was prima maar minder geschikt voor een ouder iemand - De ligging De wenteltrap

Endroit trés agréable, j'y retournerai - Le studio est super, bien décoré et bien équipé, trés bien situé à 3 min de la plage et 5 min des bars de nuits. Le bruit :( le seul point négatif du séjour. Le studio au rdc, on entend tous les bruits de la rue et les entrées dans l'immeuble
Molt bé - Ubicació Obra nova però algun calaix no encaixava bé
- Cambiar las ventanas que se oye el ruido de la calle… campanas.

Every morning, construction workers were drilling throughout our entire stay. They drilled freely from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. The appliances here are also terrible. The refrigerator started leaking on the very first day. The dishwasher is rusty and rotting. The kettle and toaster are the cheapest ones they could possibly buy and provide. And finally, there are ants here, and they come out from all the baseboards. They crawl literally everywhere. There are so many of them that we got tired of fighting them.
